name: meridian-monorepo
description: Meridian — binary-options prediction market on Solana (monorepo root)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n app,automation -c blue,magenta "pnpm --filter app dev" "pnpm --filter automation dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @meridian/types build && pnpm --filter app build && pnpm --filter automation build
